en-us.title: Those Who Stay Behind
en-us.description: I play with the ring, watching the light dance on the polished metal’s surface as I roll it between my fingers. A ray of sunlight catches the part of the band that had been transformed into a diamond, the brilliance nearly bringing tears to my eyes as I squint. I let out a long sigh and shake my head at the obvious. How could it have been otherwise?
en-us.html:
• Tales

    over 1 year ago4 minutes

    Those Who Stay Behind

    I play with the ring, watching the light dance on the polished metal’s surface as I roll it between my fingers. A ray of sunlight catches the part of the band that had been transformed into a diamond, the brilliance nearly bringing tears to my eyes as I squint. I let out a long sigh and shake my head at the obvious. How could it have been otherwise?

fr-fr.title: Je m’accrocherai à toi
fr-fr.description: D'une oreille discrète, j'écoute le jeune Bravos se pavaner comme un coq devant ses potes. Il a remonté sa capuche sur le sommet de sa tête, pour abriter son crâne aux cheveux coupés ras et probablement pour se donner un style, même si je ne sais pas vraiment lequel.
fr-fr.html:
• Récits

    il y a plus d’un an4 minutes

    Je m’accrocherai à toi

    D'une oreille discrète, j'écoute le jeune Bravos se pavaner comme un coq devant ses potes. Il a remonté sa capuche sur le sommet de sa tête, pour abriter son crâne aux cheveux coupés ras et probablement pour se donner un style, même si je ne sais pas vraiment lequel.
